---
title: "Session 23"
name: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "13 March 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---


```{r}
# ANOVA

## comparing more than 2 vectors
x = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=5)
y = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=6)
z = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=7)
```

```{r}
data.frame(values=c(x,y,z),
           variable=c(rep("x", length(x)),
                      rep("y", length(y)),
                      rep("z", length(z)))) -> xyzBox

boxplot(xyzBox$values~xyzBox$variable,
        main = "One wayANOVA",
        xlab = "Groups",
        ylab = "Values",
        col = c("lightblue", "lightpink", "lightgreen"))
```

```{r}
# ANOVA

## comparing more than 2 vectors
a = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=60)
b = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=6)
c = rnorm(10, sd=10, mean=7)
```

```{r}
data.frame(values=c(x,y,z),
           variable=c(rep("a", length(a)),
                      rep("b", length(b)),
                      rep("c", length(c)))) -> abcBox

boxplot(abcBox$values~abcBox$variable,
        main = "One way ANOVA",
        xlab = "Groups",
        ylab = "Values",
        col = c("lightblue", "lightpink", "lightgreen"))
```
```{r}
# rbind will append the rows

rbind(abcBox,xyzBox) -> abcxyzBox

boxplot(abcxyzBox$values~abcxyzBox$variable,
        main = "One way ANOVA",
        xlab = "Groups",
        ylab = "Values",
        col = c("lightblue", "lightpink", "lightgreen"))
```

```{r}
# One way anova

res.aov <- aov(values ~ variable, data = abcxyzBox)

# Null hypothesis: All groups have the same mean

res.aov
```


```{r}
summary(res.aov)
```

```{r}
# Alternative Hypothesis: All groups don't have the same mean

res.aov_alt <- aov(values ~ variable, data = xyzBox)

res.aov_alt
```

```{r}
summary(res.aov_alt)
```

```{r}
# ANOVA

## comparing more than 2 vectors
p = rnorm(50, sd=10, mean=20)
q = rnorm(60, sd=10, mean=5)
r = rnorm(80, sd=10, mean=10)
```

```{r}
data.frame(values=c(p,q,r),
           variable=c(rep("p", length(p)),
                      rep("q", length(q)),
                      rep("r", length(r)))) -> pqrBox

boxplot(pqrBox$values~pqrBox$variable,
        main = "One way ANOVA",
        xlab = "Groups",
        ylab = "Values",
        col = c("lightblue", "lightpink", "lightgreen"))
```
